chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1855 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 30.11.2016. Mr. Ghulam Sajjad Gopang, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Sher Muhammad Leghari, State Counsel a/w SIP Maqsood Ahmed Channa SHO P.S 60 Mile and ASI Manzoor Ali o/b of SHO P.S B-Section, Nawabshah. = Today, the petitioners’ Counsel is present alongwith petitioners and petitioner No.1-Mst.Hakim Zadi has confirmed the contents of the petition to the effect that she has contracted a freewill marriage with petitioner No.2- Soomar S/o Ali Dino. Today, the parawise comments have been filed by the learned State Counsel, in which police have, inter-alia, undertaken to provide protection to the petitioners, if they are approached with such a request. This petition is disposed of with the directions to the respondents No.9, 10, 11 and 12 namely Ghulam Hussain, Javed, Sajjad and Ashiq that they should not cause any harassment to the petitioners and police officials are further directed to provide protection to the petitioners, if they are approached with such a request but strictly in accordance with law. SIP Maqsood Ahmed Channa SHO P.S 30 Mile present in Court is directed to serve the copy of this order on above named private respondents by calling them in police station and a compliance of such service should be furnished with the Additional Registrar of this Court. JUDGE Shahid
